description: L4 implicit inversion: 3 hard tasks (merge_sort/binary_search/bfs), example-only delivery

results.response_snippet:
def merge_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr[:]
    mid = len(arr) // 2
    left = merge_sort(arr[:mid])
    right = merge_sort(arr[mid:])
    merged = []
    i = j = 0
    while i <

def bfs(graph, start):
    visited = set([start])
    queue = [start]
    order = []

    while queue:
        node = queue.pop(0)
        order.append(node)
        for neighbor in graph.get(node, []
